name: Rohit Vipin Mathews
title: Director - Engineering & Architecture
headline: Engineering leader scaling teams from 0→100+, delivering cloud-native AI-enabled platforms across education, agriculture, and logistics.
bio: Director of Engineering & Architecture with 14+ years of progressive experience building and scaling engineering organizations, leading complex modernization programs, and delivering cloud-native, AI-enabled platforms across education, agriculture, and logistics domains. Known for combining organization-level leadership with technical depth across .NET, AWS, Azure, microservices, serverless systems, data platforms, and AI enablement. Champion for engineering excellence through AI-assisted development, running pilot programs in agentic AI and advanced development workflows while establishing guilds for Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and modern engineering practices.
